title: AN ACT DECLARING THE LAST FULL WEEK OF AUGUST AS ARMED FORCES OF THE FILIPINO PEOPLE WEEK

chunks.text:
H. No. 945; Manila Bulletin (July 8 2015); 111 OG No. 33, 4806 (August 17, 2015)

[ REPUBLIC ACT No. 10664, July 06, 2015 ]

AN ACT DECLARING THE LAST FULL WEEK OF AUGUST AS ARMED FORCES OF THE FILIPINO PEOPLE WEEK

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Short Title. â This Act shall be known as the âArmed Forces of the Filipino People Weekâ.

SEC. 2. Armed Forces of the Filipino People Week. â To give due recognition to the important role and contributions of past and present Filipino military officers and personnel, the last full week of August is hereby declared the Armed Forces of the Filipino People Week.

SEC. 3. Lead Agency. â The Department of National Defense (DND) shall urge all citizens to recognize an âArmed Forces of the Filipino People Weekâ and shall hold programs and activities in observance of the event.

SEC. 4. Implementing Rules and Regulations. â The DND shall promulgate the appropriate rules and regulations necessary for the effective implementation of this Act within sixty (60) days from its approval.

SEC. Effectivity. â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15)days after its publication in the Official Gazette or in at least two(2) newspapers of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(SGD.) FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 10, 2014 and May 4, 2015, respectively.

(SGD.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: JULY 06, 2015

(SGD) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
